title: Add documentation and completions for the following flags
body:
--add-host
	--cgroup-parent
	--cpu-period
	--cpu-quota
	--cpu-shares
	--cpuset-mems
	--memory
	--memory-swap
	--security-opt
	--ulimit

These flags are going to be used by buildah run and bud.
The implementation will follow in another PR.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: FWIW, Red Hat CI failed with an unrelated network issue during the rpm build test.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I have a PR ready to go in with most of the implementation as soon as this is in. Just seemed easier to get everything into the docs in one go.
Ok I will merge but we can not cut a release until those patches get in.
@rhatdan can we get this in? I have the implementation ready.

:pushpin: Commit c14697e has been approved by `rhatdan`
